key: aula6_listening1_opening
text: Thanks for joining, everyone. Let us get started. The goal today is to align on our partnership plan. Here is our agenda. First, the onboarding timeline. Then, the commission terms. And finally, next steps and action items. I think this should take about thirty minutes. Let us begin with the timeline.

key: aula6_listening2_closing
text: Okay, I think we have covered everything. Let me wrap up. To recap, we agreed on the timeline, we approved the commission terms, and we set a launch date for next month. Two action items: I will send the minutes by end of day, and your team will confirm the contract by Wednesday. Our next meeting is next Tuesday. Thank you, everyone.
